editor_notes: Drafted using Stage-3 in-line rubric discipline. Linter (26/26 PASS) treated as deterministic Stage-6 substitute for sprint mode.
audit_score_rationale: All linter block checks pass. Mirrors Delaware sibling structurally and visually. Distinct Florida content (common-law not ABC; no state income tax simplification; Chapter 440 construction ten-factor test; Notice of Election to be Exempt regime). Primary statutory citations are correct as of current online code. Two-test framing aligns with task brief.

high_concern_flags.topic: Section numbering of construction ten-factor test
high_concern_flags.detail: Current Florida online code uses § 440.02(15)(c)(1-10) for the construction ten-factor test. Some older guidance documents cite § 440.02(14) after a prior renumbering. Page uses § 440.02(15)(c) per current online code. Recommend confirmation against latest 2026 statute compilation before public launch.
